languages.text: {n}В словах чужака явно присутствует правда, умело скрываемая за недосказанностью. Если лаборатория превратилась в гнездилище ксеносов, то их отсутствие вокруг непохоже на случайность. Похоже, вы здесь не одни.{/n}

{n}There is truth to the xenos's words, skilfully concealed behind understatement. If the laboratory has become a nesting ground for xenos, their absence is no accident. It seems you are not alone here.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}В словах чужака явно присутствует правда, умело скрываемая за недосказанностью. Если лаборатория превратилась в гнездилище ксеносов, то их отсутствие вокруг непохоже на случайность. Похоже, вы здесь не одни.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}There is truth to the xenos's words, skilfully concealed behind understatement. If the laboratory has become a nesting ground for xenos, their absence is no accident. It seems you are not alone here.{/n}

{n}There is truth to the xenos's words, skilfully concealed behind understatement. If the laboratory has become a nesting ground for xenos, their absence is no accident. It seems you are not alone here.{/n}

{n}There is truth to the xenos's words, skilfully concealed behind understatement. If the laboratory has become a nesting ground for xenos, their absence is no accident. It seems you are not alone here.{/n}

languages.text: {n}异形的话语中隐藏着真相，巧妙藏于轻描淡写之下。如果实验室已成为异形巢穴，那么它们的缺席绝非凑巧。看来，你并非独自在此。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There is truth to the xenos's words, skilfully concealed behind understatement. If the laboratory has become a nesting ground for xenos, their absence is no accident. It seems you are not alone here.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}异形的话语中隐藏着真相，巧妙藏于轻描淡写之下。如果实验室已成为异形巢穴，那么它们的缺席绝非凑巧。看来，你并非独自在此。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La verdad en las palabras del xenos se esconde detrás de varias sutilezas. Si el laboratorio se ha convertido en un nido de xenos, eso significa que su ausencia es intencionada. Parece que no estás sol{mf|o|a}.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There is truth to the xenos's words, skilfully concealed behind understatement. If the laboratory has become a nesting ground for xenos, their absence is no accident. It seems you are not alone here.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La verdad en las palabras del xenos se esconde detrás de varias sutilezas. Si el laboratorio se ha convertido en un nido de xenos, eso significa que su ausencia es intencionada. Parece que no estás sol{mf|o|a}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Il y a une part de vérité dans les paroles du xénos, habilement dissimulée derrière un choix de mots subtil. Si le laboratoire est devenu un repaire pour les xénos, leur absence n'a rien d'une coïncidence. De toute évidence, vous n'êtes pas seuls ici.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There is truth to the xenos's words, skilfully concealed behind understatement. If the laboratory has become a nesting ground for xenos, their absence is no accident. It seems you are not alone here.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Il y a une part de vérité dans les paroles du xénos, habilement dissimulée derrière un choix de mots subtil. Si le laboratoire est devenu un repaire pour les xénos, leur absence n'a rien d'une coïncidence. De toute évidence, vous n'êtes pas seuls ici.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Zenonun yetersiz ifadelerin ardına ustaca gizlenmiş sözlerinde doğruluk payı olduğunu görüyorsun. Laboratuvar zenoların yuvasına dönüştüyse yoklukları tesadüf değildir. Görünüşe göre burada yalnız değilsiniz.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There is truth to the xenos's words, skilfully concealed behind understatement. If the laboratory has become a nesting ground for xenos, their absence is no accident. It seems you are not alone here.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Zenonun yetersiz ifadelerin ardına ustaca gizlenmiş sözlerinde doğruluk payı olduğunu görüyorsun. Laboratuvar zenoların yuvasına dönüştüyse yoklukları tesadüf değildir. Görünüşe göre burada yalnız değilsiniz.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Worte des Xenos bergen eine geschickt als Untertreibung getarnte Wahrheit. Wenn das Labor eine Brutstätte für Xenos war, ist ihre Abwesenheit kein Zufall. Wie es scheint, bist du nicht allein.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There is truth to the xenos's words, skilfully concealed behind understatement. If the laboratory has become a nesting ground for xenos, their absence is no accident. It seems you are not alone here.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Worte des Xenos bergen eine geschickt als Untertreibung getarnte Wahrheit. Wenn das Labor eine Brutstätte für Xenos war, ist ihre Abwesenheit kein Zufall. Wie es scheint, bist du nicht allein.{/n}

languages.text: {n}異形の者の言葉には、巧みに控えめな表現で隠された真実がある。もしこの研究所が異形の者の巣窟となっていたならば、彼らの不在は偶然ではない。君たちだけではないようだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}There is truth to the xenos's words, skilfully concealed behind understatement. If the laboratory has become a nesting ground for xenos, their absence is no accident. It seems you are not alone here.{/n}
